name: Banana Chocolate Chip Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch x 5-inch x 3-inch loaf pan.
3. Cream together the sugar and butter using an electric mixer until light in texture.
4. Add the eggs and mix well until combined.
5. On low speed, gradually mix in the mashed bananas, milk, and vanilla extract.
6. Stop the mixer and carefully add the flour, baking soda, and salt.
7. Mix until just combined, then gently stir in the chocolate chips and nuts.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
9. Bake for 55 to 60 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
